uuid.description: Unique identifier of an ACH transaction

company_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the company to which the ACH transaction belongs

payment_event_type.description: The type of payment event associated with the ACH transaction

payment_event_uuid.description: Unique identifier for the payment event associated with the ACH transaction

recipient_type.description: The type of recipient associated with the ACH transaction

recipient_uuid.description: Unique identifier for the recipient associated with the ACH transaction

error_code.description: The error code associated with the ACH transaction, if any. If there is no error on the ACH transaction, this field will be nil. See [this article](https://engineering.gusto.com/how-ach-works-a-developer-perspective-part-2/) for a complete list of ACH return codes.

transaction_type.description: The type of transaction associated with the ACH transaction

payment_status.description: The status of the ACH transaction

payment_event_check_date.description: The date of the payment event check associated with the ACH transaction

payment_date.description: The date of the payment associated with the ACH transaction

amount.description: The amount of money moved by the ACH transaction. This amount is always non-negative.

description.description: The description of the ACH transaction. Can be used to identify the ACH transaction on the recipient's bank statement.

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
